div1.entryFree: Seriously, gravely, in earnest, not in jest: Juno and Ceres whisper s. Tp. IV, 125. if s. I may convey my thoughts in this my light deliverance, All's II, 1, 84. this that s. he does address himself unto, III, 6, 103. dost thou speak s.? Tim. III, 2, 47. this to hear would Desdemona s. incline, Oth. I, 3, 146.
